title: Edge
description: A directed relationship between two nodes. Carried under payload.edge by edge.added and by semantic edge-bearing events (contradiction.detected, override.accepted); one edge is created by exactly one event (see provenance/graph-model.md). from/to accept any well-formed node ID, including endpoints outside the current artifact (A1.5); a future pgf check warns, does not fail, on cross-artifact endpoints. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive; type is an OPEN string documented against the six v0.1 values in graph-model.md, deliberately NOT hard-enum'd, for parity with the open event_type pattern.

id.description: Node/edge ID embedding the artifact ID, e.g. edge:association-board-brief-001:x004.

type.description: Edge type. The v0.1 registry (documented in provenance/graph-model.md, not enum-enforced here) is: supports, contradicts, derived_from, reviewed_by, overrides, released_as.

from.description: Source endpoint node ID (any well-formed node ID).

to.description: Target endpoint node ID (any well-formed node ID).
